creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178462
v0

textproc/aspell was last updated in ports r277062. textproc/hunspell is more likely to be pulled as a dependency for other ports e.g., textproc/enchant. ArchLinux and Debian appear to compile both in. In such a case hunspell is selected by default.

Disclaimer: I don't use this port but interested in dogfooding hunspell updates.
